details.test: Task 1: Cheapest evening festival event tickets with seat selection

Task 4: Save vocal program and update scholarship note
Task 5: Build non-overlapping personal schedule of affordable events
Task 6: Purchase annual membership under $150 with ticket discount and behind-the-scenes access
Task 7: Save three short 'bel canto' resources to reading list
Task 8: Register participant Jordan Lee (age 10) for earliest vocal program under $500
Task 9: Make one-time $75 donation to Education & Training Fund (anonymous, no postal mail)
